programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: While Joe launches his latest product, Gordon settles in at Mutiny; Donna and Cameron work to expand beyond chat.

programme.desc: Cameron and Donna have a hard time finding venture capital; Joe hires a key coder and leaves the rest of the team at a loss.

programme.desc: Donna and Gordon treat themselves to a vacation at home instead of camping; Joe and Ryan have a revelation; Cameron and Bos return to Texas.

programme.desc: Ming has the chance to purchase an oversized toy from the '80s; taking a wife on the perfect date.

programme.desc: Cameron helps Donna pack up; Bos makes his famous chili; Joe helps Haley recover a memorable keepsake; Gordon and Donna fight.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Toxic masculinity makes a comeback in Martin's spine, Orson's gut, Duncan's shins; but the feminine side is strong: Sorrel's tincture, Lili's mud, JoJo's bridge; Anushka holds Duncan's feet to the fire as an atomic reaction sweeps through Las Altas.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: In the late 1960s and early 1970s, law enforcement discover a pattern of murdered hitchhikers and young men; their investigation lead them to an unassuming aerospace engineer, who lives a double life as a sadistic killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Patrick Kearney behind bars, police realize another predator is on the loose; an investigation leads to "The Freeway Killer" and his torture chamber on wheels; the murders suggest the work of more than one single killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: In the late 1960s and early 1970s, law enforcement discover a pattern of murdered hitchhikers and young men; their investigation lead them to an unassuming aerospace engineer, who lives a double life as a sadistic killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Patrick Kearney behind bars, police realize another predator is on the loose; an investigation leads to "The Freeway Killer" and his torture chamber on wheels; the murders suggest the work of more than one single killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: In the late 1960s and early 1970s, law enforcement discover a pattern of murdered hitchhikers and young men; their investigation lead them to an unassuming aerospace engineer, who lives a double life as a sadistic killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Patrick Kearney behind bars, police realize another predator is on the loose; an investigation leads to "The Freeway Killer" and his torture chamber on wheels; the murders suggest the work of more than one single killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: In November 1959, four members of the Clutter family are brutally murdered in their home in a small Kansas farming community.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: Kansas law enforcement survey the aftermath of the seemingly unmotivated crime, while criminals Perry Smith and Richard Hickock go on the lam.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: Detailing the resulting investigation and convictions of Perry Smith and Richard Hickock, along with the ensuing media coverage.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: As Perry Smith and Richard Hickock face a death sentence, Truman Capote's coverage of the infamous case and his ensuing novel, "In Cold Blood," spawns the modern American True Crime genre.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: In November 1959, four members of the Clutter family are brutally murdered in their home in a small Kansas farming community.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: Kansas law enforcement survey the aftermath of the seemingly unmotivated crime, while criminals Perry Smith and Richard Hickock go on the lam.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: Detailing the resulting investigation and convictions of Perry Smith and Richard Hickock, along with the ensuing media coverage.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: As Perry Smith and Richard Hickock face a death sentence, Truman Capote's coverage of the infamous case and his ensuing novel, "In Cold Blood," spawns the modern American True Crime genre.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: When Patch O'Furr is tagged in a mysterious online post, he must face the fact that animal abusers are hiding in plain sight in the Furry Fandom; Furry Detectives comb through evidence and discover one popular Youtuber is a suspect.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: An online 3D printing group leads to a break in the case and The Furry Detectives get their first arrest; the Zoosadist ringleader, known as SnakeThing, is still out there.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: It wasn't just animals, he was hurting people too; the self-proclaimed Furvengers must battle through legal obstacles and personal attacks as they hunt for SnakeThing.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: A video shared in the Furry community by a person named "Monster" causes a new level of vigilante detective work; clues lead to a remote shipping container in the outback of Australia owned by a well-respected celebrity.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: When Patch O'Furr is tagged in a mysterious online post, he must face the fact that animal abusers are hiding in plain sight in the Furry Fandom; Furry Detectives comb through evidence and discover one popular Youtuber is a suspect.

programme.title: The Furry Detectives: Unmasking A Monster
programme.desc: An online 3D printing group leads to a break in the case and The Furry Detectives get their first arrest; the Zoosadist ringleader, known as SnakeThing, is still out there.
